---
title: "Benchmarking nf-core/createtaxdb pipeline execution"
author: "James Fellows Yates"
format: html
---

## Introduction

The notebook describes the set up of the execution of the nf-core/createtaxdb benchmarking run.

## Requirements

Command line tools used in this notebook includes:

- `nextflow` (version 25.10.4 build 11173)

## Retrieving pipeline

We will benchmarking with v2.1.0 of nf-core/createtaxdb

```{bash}
nextflow pull nf-core/createtaxdb -r 2.1.0
```

## Pipeline execution

Make a fresh screen session for safety

```{bash}
screen -R ctb
```

```{bash}
##########################################################
### TODO: try adding --kmcp_options '--by-seq' ################################################
##########################################################
nextflow run nf-core/createtaxdb -r 2.1.0 \
--input samplesheet.csv \
--outdir s3://createtaxdb-output/results/ \
--dbname benchmark \
--accession2taxid s3://createtaxdb-input/auxiliary-files/nucl_gb.accession2taxid \
--prot2taxid s3://createtaxdb-input/auxiliary-files/prot2taxid.map \
--nucl2taxid s3://createtaxdb-input/auxiliary-files/nucl2taxid.map \
--nodesdmp s3://createtaxdb-input/auxiliary-files/nodes.dmp \
--namesdmp s3://createtaxdb-input/auxiliary-files/names.dmp \
--genomesizes s3://createtaxdb-input/auxiliary-files/species_genome_size.txt.gz \
--build_bracken \
--build_centrifuge \
--build_diamond \
--build_ganon \
--build_kaiju \
--build_kmcp \
--build_kraken2 \
--build_krakenuniq  \
--krakenuniq_build_options "--jellyfish-bin \"\$(which jellyfish)\"" \
--build_sylph \
--build_metacache \
-w work/ \
-c custom.config \
-resume
```

<!--
nextflow run nf-core/createtaxdb \
 -r 2.1.0 \
 --input samplesheet_raven.csv \
 -profile mpcdf,raven \
 --outdir /ptmp/jfellowsy/projects/taxprofiler-createtaxdb-paper/benchmarking/createtaxdb/results/ \
 --dbname benchmark \
 --accession2taxid /ptmp/jfellowsy/projects/taxprofiler-createtaxdb-paper/benchmarking/auxiliary-files/nucl_gb.accession2taxid \
 --prot2taxid /ptmp/jfellowsy/projects/taxprofiler-createtaxdb-paper/benchmarking/auxiliary-files/prot2taxid.map \
 --nucl2taxid /ptmp/jfellowsy/projects/taxprofiler-createtaxdb-paper/benchmarking/auxiliary-files/nucl2taxid.map \
 --nodesdmp /ptmp/jfellowsy/projects/taxprofiler-createtaxdb-paper/benchmarking/auxiliary-files/nodes.dmp \
 --namesdmp /ptmp/jfellowsy/projects/taxprofiler-createtaxdb-paper/benchmarking/auxiliary-files/names.dmp \
 --genomesizes /ptmp/jfellowsy/projects/taxprofiler-createtaxdb-paper/benchmarking/auxiliary-files/species_genome_size.txt.gz \
 --build_bracken \
 --build_centrifuge \
 --build_diamond \
 --build_ganon \
 --build_kaiju \
 --build_kmcp \
 --kmcp_compute_options="--by-seq"
 --build_kraken2 \
 --build_krakenuniq \
 --krakenuniq_build_options '--jellyfish-bin "$(which jellyfish)"' \
 --build_sylph \
 --build_metacache \
 -w work/ \
 -resume \
 -c custom.config \
-->

## Harddrive usage

The resulting results directory was

### 30k

```{bash}
$ du -h --max-depth 1
2.8M	./multiqc
29G	./kaiju
72G	./metacache
170G	./kraken2
1.2T	./krakenuniq
42G	./kmcp
2.8G	./sylph
51G	./ganon
43M	./pipeline_info
26G	./diamond
199G	./bracken
32G	./centrifuge
1.8T	.

```
